title: Monday Doc Table: Select multiple cells at once
excerpt: I would love to be able to select multiple cells in a table in a Monday doc. This way I can change the font size or formatting of a bunch of cells at once instead of having to select the text inside if each and every cel…

posts.author: dschneider (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to select multiple cells in a table in a Monday doc. This way I can change the font size or formatting of a bunch of cells at once instead of having to select the text inside if each and every cell individually. I would also like to be able to select multiple rows or columns and delete them all at once instead of having to do that individually.
